title: leucanthemum waldsteinii
intro: Leucanthemum waldsteinii, also known as the mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum waldsteinii may include infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
